programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In this whimsical animated adventure, a mermaid princess makes a deal with a sea witch to transform into a human.

programme.title: An Eskimo Tale
programme.desc: Three young Inuits set off in search of a promised land to save their clan from starvation. AKA The Legend of Sarila and AKA Frozen Land

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: My Name Is Nobody
programme.desc: A young, easy-going gunman worships and competes with a famed gunfighter, insisting that he must face down a gang of 150 outlaws before he can retire. - Iconic, epic and Classic Western with Superstars Henry Fonda and Terence Hill.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his son who was killed in the Pyrenees while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind.

programme.title: Killing Dad
programme.desc: A man always very devoted to his mother decides to look for his father, whom he never met. He meets a seductive older woman prone to drinking and her aged boyfriend, with whom she has grown tired.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: A young black woman discovers that her father was a sperm donor, and if that weren't bad enough, he's white!

programme.title: Crocodile
programme.desc: A group of college students on a swamp tour in California are attacked by a giant crocodile.

programme.title: Crocodile 2: Death Swamp
programme.desc: A plane crashes in a remote swamp area, and the survivors must battle a gigantic crocodile to survive.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Vampires vamp it up in this hilarious mock-doc. Viago, Deacon and Vladislav are vampires who are finding that modern life has them struggling with the mundane - like paying rent, keeping up with the chore wheel, trying to get into nightclubs and overcoming flatmate conflicts.

programme.title: Gorgo
programme.desc: The classic sci-fi story of a captured baby prehistoric monster put on display in London, with giant momma monster coming to the rescue!

programme.title: Meet My Valentine
programme.desc: After finding out he has only months to live, Tom sets out to make sure that his wife and 8 year old daughter are taken care of after he is gone.

programme.title: Mothers Of The Bride
programme.desc: Jenna is getting married, her mother is delighted until Jenna announces she wants to find her birth mother.
